Plaintiff Mission Oaks Development, Llc'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MISSION OAKS DEVELOPMENT, LLC'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.
APPEARANCES: Mark B. Aldrich, Esq. of Aldrich Law Group 650/632-4218 for pltf & moving party; Therese Y. Cannata, Esq. of Cannata, Ching & O'Toole LLP 409-8900 specially appearing for landlord Highway 70.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted, no opposition filed. Plaintiff to provide copy of modified TRO, proof of service of TRO, and proposed preliminary injunction. Court will issue preliminary injunction against only those defendant(s) that were served with the TRO. (302/JEM) Judge: John E. Munter, Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, CSR 956
